changelog:
### 🚀 Upcoming Items & Due Date Banner
- **Due Items Banner** — Introduced an interactive banner on the Ledger and Home screens that highlights active Subscriptions and Debt Installments reaching their due date (`<= today`).
- **1-Tap Approval & Ledger Posting** — Users can approve due items directly from the banner to select an Asset Account and Pot. Approving logs an outflow transaction, deducts the account balance, and automatically advances the subscription cycle or marks debt schedules as paid.
- **Snooze & Postpone** — Option to postpone subscription billing dates directly from the due items view.

### 🔧 Forecast Engine & Scheduled Ledger Fixes
- **Scheduled Inflows & Outflows in Forecast** — Fixed `ForecastEngine` to project both expected inflows and scheduled outflows from future/pending ledger transactions accurately across the 90-day runway.
- **Double-Counting Prevention** — Ensured posted transactions already baked into baseline asset balances ($P_0$) are excluded from Day 0 forecast adjustments.
- **Auto-Maturation of Pending Transactions** — Scheduled transactions automatically mature and post balance updates to asset accounts as soon as their timestamp arrives.
- **Scheduled Badge & Instant Post Action** — Added a visual "Scheduled" badge on pending ledger tiles and a "⚡ Post Now" button to execute future transactions immediately when paid early.
